name: Ginkgo Biloba Extract
summary: Modest improvement in cognitive function in dementia.
description: Ginkgo biloba extract is associated with modest cognitive benefits in dementia studies, plausibly via antioxidant and microvascular signaling effects.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: discontinue at least 2 weeks before surgery due to bleeding risk
anticoagulant or antiplatelet medications such as warfarin aspirin or clopidogrel carry additive bleeding risk
may reduce effectiveness of omeprazole or other proton-pump inhibitors
may interact with oral diabetes medications or alprazolam.
